zh.lifeSummary: 當Salome von Geldern-Zutphen於1125年出生在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可萊斯 蓋爾德時，她的父親Gerhard II. von Geldern Wassenberg39歲，母親Ermgard van Zutphen35歲。她於大約1166年與Graf Heinrich I von Oldenburg結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1167年在德國尼德薩辛藍德可萊斯 歐登伯格維爾德沙奧森享年42歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Salome von Geldern-Zutphen于1125年出生在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可萊斯 蓋爾德时，她的父亲Gerhard II. von Geldern Wassenberg39岁，母亲Ermgard van Zutphen35岁。她于大约1166年与Graf Heinrich I von Oldenburg结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1167年在德国尼德薩辛藍德可萊斯 歐登伯格維爾德沙奧森享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Salome
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of an unrecorded Aramaic name, akin to the Hebrew word shalom ‘peace’. It was common at the time of Christ, and was borne by one of the women who were at his tomb and witnessed the Resurrection (Mark 16:1–8). This would normally have led to its common use as a Christian name, and it is indeed found as such in medieval times. However, according to the Jewish historian Josephus, it was also the name of King Herod's stepdaughter, the daughter of Queen Herodias. In the Bible, a daughter of Herodias, generally identified as this Salome, danced for Herod and so pleased him that he offered to give her anything she wanted. Prompted by her mother, she asked for (and got) the head of John the Baptist, who was in one of Herod's prisons (Mark 6:17–28). This story so gripped medieval imagination that the name Salome became more or less taboo until the end of the 19th century, when Oscar Wilde wrote a play about her and some unconventional souls began to choose the name for their daughters.

en.lifeSummary: When Salome von Geldern-Zutphen was born in 1125, in Geldern, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany, her father, Gerhard II. von Geldern Wassenberg, was 39 and her mother, Ermgard van Zutphen, was 35. She married Graf Heinrich I von Oldenburg about 1166. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1167, in Wildeshausen, Oldenburg, Lower Saxony, Germany, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Salome von Geldern-Zutphen est née en 1125, à Kreis Geldern, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne, son père, Gerhard II. von Geldern Wassenberg, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Ermgard van Zutphen, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Graf Heinrich I von Oldenburg environ 1166. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1167, à Wildeshausen, Landkreis Oldenburg, Niedersachsen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Salome von Geldern-Zutphen 1125 in Kreis Geldern, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gerhard II. von Geldern Wassenberg 39 und ihre Mutter Ermgard van Zutphen 35. Sie hat um 1166 Graf Heinrich I von Oldenburg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1167 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Wildeshausen, Landkreis Oldenburg, Niedersachsen, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Salome von Geldern-Zutphen è nata il nel 1125 nel Kreis Geldern, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania, sua padre, Gerhard II. von Geldern Wassenberg, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Ermgard van Zutphen, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato Graf Heinrich I von Oldenburg circa 1166. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1167, nel Wildeshausen, Landkreis Oldenburg, Niedersachsen, Germania, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Salome von Geldern-Zutphenが1125年にドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンクレイス ジェルデルンで生まれた時，父Gerhard II. von Geldern Wassenbergは39歳，母Ermgard van Zutphenは35歳であった。約1166年にGraf Heinrich I von Oldenburgと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1167年にドイツニーダーサチセンランドクレイス オルデンブルグウィルデシャウセンで42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Salome von Geldern-Zutphen(이)가 1125년 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 크레이스 글더에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gerhard II. von Geldern Wassenberg(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ermgard van Zutphen(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 대략 1166년 Graf Heinrich I von Oldenburg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1167년 독일 니더작센 랜드크레이스 덴버그 윌데쇼센에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Salome von Geldern-Zutphen nasceu em 1125, em Kreis Geldern, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha, seu pai, Gerhard II. von Geldern Wassenberg, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Ermgard van Zutphen, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Graf Heinrich I von Oldenburg aproximadamente 1166. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1167, em Wildeshausen, Landkreis Oldenburg, Niedersachsen, Alemanha, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Salome von Geldern-Zutphen родилась в 1125 г. в местности крис джелдирн, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия, её отцу по имени Gerhard II. von Geldern Wassenberg было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Ermgard van Zutphen, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Graf Heinrich I von Oldenburg около 1166 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1167 г. в местности уаилдешаусен, ландкрис олденбург, ниедирсачсен, Германия в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Salome von Geldern-Zutphen nació en 1125, en Kreis Geldern, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania, su papá, Gerhard II. von Geldern Wassenberg, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Ermgard van Zutphen, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Graf Heinrich I von Oldenburg aproximadamente 1166. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1167, en Wildeshausen, Landkreis Oldenburg, Niedersachsen, Alemania, a la edad de 42 años.
